description: AquaAlert IoT — Monitoreo de nivel de agua en tiempo real

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, fill_pct as "Llenado %" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, water_level_cm as "Nivel" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, battery_pct as "Bateria %" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT time, CASE alert_level WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 0 WHEN 'WATCH' THEN 1 WHEN 'WARNING' THEN 2 WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END as "Alerta" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, water_level_cm as "Nivel agua", distance_cm as "Distancia sensor" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, fill_pct as "Llenado" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, rssi as "RSSI", snr as "SNR" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, battery_pct as "Bateria" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_eui) time, device_eui, latitude, longitude, fill_pct FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' AND latitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY device_eui, time DESC
SELECT time, latitude as "Latitud" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' AND latitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, longitude as "Longitud" FROM sensor_readings WHERE device_eui = '$device_eui' AND longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT device_eui FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY device_eui
list.label: Dispositivo
list.name: device_eui
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT device_eui FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY device_eui

title: AquaAlert — Monitor de Nivel
